name: Mercer Island Golf Club
about: The Mercer Island Golf Club is a private indoor golf center located in downtown Mercer Island. It operates on a membership-only basis, allowing members to reserve up to 2 hours per day, 365 days per year. The facility is designed to provide an uncrowded golfing experience with limited membership ensuring availability and privacy. Members can enjoy access to advanced golf simulator technology in a dedicated, private setting.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman and Foresight GC Hawk simulator technology
Guaranteed 2-hour daily reservations, 365 days a year
Limited membership ensures no overcrowding and privacy
Convenient downtown Mercer Island location with free parking

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar-based launch monitor for accurate ball tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, members are typically expected to provide their own clubs for use with the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not mention policies on outside food and drinks, so it's recommended to contact the venue directly for clarification.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The standard 2-hour reservation time suggests that 18 holes can typically be completed within this timeframe, though actual time may vary depending on simulator software and player pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers golf lessons and appears to accommodate juniors and youth, making it kid-friendly.
